rateCard.title: Creator Rate Card (Code with Ahsan)
rateCard.article:
All rates below include a **12-month license** for the client to use the content for organic resharing on their owned social media channels and website, with full attribution. See "Usage Rights Add-Ons" for extended or paid media rights.

### **[YouTube ↗️](http://youtube.com/codewithahsan) (34k+ Subscribers)**

*Your most valuable platform for in-depth, evergreen content.*

- **Dedicated Long-Form Video (20-30 mins):** **Starting at $3,000**
As a 12-year software industry veteran, I create in-depth video content that resonates with my 34,700+ YouTube subscribers. My dedicated long-form videos are typically 20-30 minutes long, involving thorough research and production time to deliver high-quality content. This package includes a detailed product review, real-world application demonstrations, prominent mentions in the description, a pinned comment, and an end-screen card. We can discuss specific details and pricing for a dedicated long-form video collaboration.

- **Dedicated Full-Length Video (5-10 mins):** **$2,200**
    - *Details:* In-depth tutorial, product review, or real-world integration. Includes prominent links in the description, a pinned comment, and an end-screen card.
- **YouTube Short (Up to 60s):** **$900**
With a 12-year software industry background, I create engaging YouTube Shorts, typically 60 seconds or less, reaching my 34,700+ YouTube subscribers. This package includes a quick feature highlight, developer tips, or a clear call to action, along with a branded tag and a link in the comments or description.
- **YouTube Mention/Integration (60-90s segment):** **$1,200**
Leveraging my 12 years in the software industry, I offer authentic integrations within my regularly scheduled long-form videos, reaching my engaged audience of 34,700+ YouTube subscribers. This package, typically 60-90 seconds, offers a dedicated segment within a longer video, providing an authentic endorsement to a relevant audience.

### **YouTube Packages:**

- **Starter Package:** 1 Full Video + 1 Short: **$2,900** *(Save $200)*
- **Growth Package:** 2 Full Videos: **$4,000** *(Save $400)*
- **Max Visibility Package:** 1 Full Video + 2 Shorts: **$3,600** *(Save $300)*
- **Scale Package:** 3 Full Videos: **$5,500** *(Save $1,100)*



### **[Instagram ↗️](https://www.instagram.com/code.with.ahsan/) (64k+ Followers)**

*High-impact visuals and direct community engagement with your largest audience.*

- **Reel (Up to 90s):** **$1,200**
    - *Details:* Engaging, high-reach video content. Includes collaborator tag for co-branding, link in bio, and brand mention in the caption.
- **Static Post / Carousel:** **$950**
    - *Details:* High-quality visuals to explain a concept or announce a feature. Ideal for saving and sharing.
- **Stories (Set of 3, with link sticker):** **$750**
    - *Details:* Direct, authentic engagement with a clear call-to-action. Perfect for time-sensitive promotions or driving traffic.

### **Instagram Packages:**

- **IG Starter:** 1 Reel + 1 Story Set: **$1,850** *(Save $100)*
- **IG Complete:** 1 Reel + 1 Post + 1 Story Set: **$2,600** *(Save $300)*



### **[LinkedIn ↗️](https://linkedin.com/in/ahsanayaz) (23k+ Followers)**

*Premium B2B audience for high-value tech products, services, and developer tools.*

- **Post (Text + Image/Video Clip):** **$1,200**
    - *Details:* Professional, value-driven post targeting a B2B audience. Includes company tag and relevant hashtags for maximum reach.
- **Article/Long-Form Post:** **$1,500**
    - *Details:* Establishes thought leadership for the brand by co-authoring an in-depth piece on a relevant technical topic.

### **LinkedIn Packages:**

- **LI Foundation:** 2 Posts: **$2,200** *(Save $200)*
- **LI Thought Leader:** 1 Post + 1 Article: **$2,500** *(Save $200)*



### **[Facebook ↗️](https://facebook.com/codewithahsan) (53k+ Followers)**

*A versatile platform for reaching a broad demographic with video and link-based content.*

- **Video Post (Up to 3 mins):** **$550**
    - *Details:* Native video upload, optimized for feed viewing. Includes brand tag and a clear call-to-action with a link in the post text.
- **Link or Image Post:** **$450**
    - *Details:* A static post driving traffic to a specific URL or highlighting a key message with visuals.



### **[TikTok ↗️](https://tiktok.com/codewithahsan) (9k+ Followers)**

*Ideal for short, trend-driven, and highly engaging developer-focused content.*

- **TikTok Video (Up to 60s):** **$700**
    - *Details:* Creative, fast-paced video leveraging platform trends. Includes brand mention, relevant hashtags, and a link in the bio for the duration of the campaign.



### **Newsletter & Community (2,100+ Subscribers · 4,400+ Discord Members)**

*Direct access to an active, high-intent developer community.*

- **Newsletter Feature (dedicated slot in issue):** **$500**
    - *Details:* Sponsored segment in the Code with Ahsan newsletter, delivered to 2,100+ subscribed developers. Includes intro copy, product description, and a direct CTA link.
- **Discord Announcement/Pinned Post:** **$400**
    - *Details:* Sponsored announcement posted and pinned in the Code with Ahsan Discord server (4,400+ developer members). Includes a custom message, brand link, and 7-day pin.
- **Newsletter + Discord Bundle:** **$750** *(Save $150)*
    - *Details:* Combined newsletter feature and Discord announcement for maximum community reach.



## **Usage Rights & Campaign Add-Ons**

The standard rates include a 12-month organic usage license. For campaigns requiring broader or longer-term rights, the following add-ons are available:

- **Paid Media (Whitelisting) License:**
    - **+30% of base rate** for a 3-month license to use the content in paid digital ads.
    - **+50% of base rate** for a 6-month license.
- **Perpetual (Lifetime) Organic Rights:**
    - **+75% of base rate** for perpetual rights for organic use only (no paid ads).
- **Full Buyout (Perpetual Paid & Organic Rights):**
    - **+150% of base rate.** The client owns the rights to use the content in any medium, anywhere, forever.
- **Exclusivity:**
    - **+25% of base rate per month** for category exclusivity (e.g., agreeing not to work with a direct competitor for a set period).
- **Raw Footage:**
    - **+40% of base rate** for delivery of all raw, unedited video files.
